heading: Application of subchapter to Louisiana and New Mexico only
label: 276 Application of subchapter to Louisiana and New Mexico only
text: The provisions of this subchapter shall apply only to the States of Louisiana and New Mexico.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , known as the Mineral Leasing Act, which comprises this chapter.act Feb. 25, 1920, ch. 8541 Stat. 437
Amendments1932—Act , substituted “States of Louisiana and New Mexico” for “State of Louisiana”.July 16, 1932
